name: defect-gatherer
description: Defect reporting and submission workflow with dispatch contract support. Reporter skill conducts structured interviews, auto-generates reproduction steps via headless Playwright (visual bugs; plugin bridge script, CI-safe) or code tracing (API bugs), cross-references requirements, and classifies as true defect, story update, or feature request. Supports dispatch from orchestrators with page URL (visual) or API endpoint identity (non-visual). Organizer skill submits to GitHub, Jira, Linear, or GitLab with system-native formatting and requirement traceability.
